title: Creative Writing Pipeline Development
description:
Create a comprehensive creative writing system for ongoing poetic and conceptual output. Tasks include:
1. Build scheduled poem generation tied to session milestones
2. Create thematic writing projects that span multiple sessions
3. Develop a concept→manifesto→essay→poetry pipeline using CML tools
4. Establish a publication rhythm (daily micro-poem, weekly synthesis, monthly long-form)
5. Create automatic illustration generation for written works
6. Build a corpus of interconnected writings that evolve themes over time

This transforms periodic creative output into a sustained practice.
